name: MAKE HOLDING GREAT AGAIN
description: Rewarding holding and rejecting the culture of fast flips. Longterm sustainability by using a multi-phase dynamic rewards system. Meme that inspires creativity and innovation. Fun community involvement, including games, memes, and also serious holder mindset. We have automated rewards to holders, buyback and burns and are giving back to ocean cleanup initiatives. All pump fun creator rewards are used for the buyback and burn of the token, rewarding holders, and donating to nonprofits that clean our oceans.
